overall_summary: ElizaOS is undergoing a foundational hardening phase, focusing on cross-platform stability for headless environments and maturing security through SOC2 compliance and SLSA build provenance. Significant development is directed toward local inference optimizations for Intel hardware and unifying the plugin architecture under a single remote/direct mode model.
key_facts: Mantle Network announced the Turing Test Hackathon with a $100K prize pool and six AI tracks running through June 15, 2026.
ElizaOS consolidated its architecture by transitioning plugins to a modern, modular ESM-first build structure to eliminate runtime conflicts.
The project implemented industry-standard security controls (SOC2) and automated security scanning to protect the framework.
Developers introduced @elizaos/vault for secure, cross-platform secrets management and transitioned to a heartbeat system for cloud reliability.
A significant performance cliff was identified for Qwen2.5-14B models on Intel iGPUs, running at only 13% of theoretical bandwidth efficiency.
The core framework was updated to support multi-architecture builds including amd64, arm64, and riscv64.
Contributor odilitime clarified that the Eliza open-source project remains active despite the commercial entity (labs) being defunct.
The project successfully migrated the Jupiter integration to the official API endpoint with mandatory security key authentication.
open_questions: Why is the JavaScript runtime unable to run on certain Linux host systems reported by community member aticmel?
Will the team choose to port Tails to riscv64 or maintain separate paths for different architectures as discussed in PR #7936?
Should the sub-agent control metadata (e.g., 'Routing Kind') be stripped at the framework layer or fixed in the sub-agent reply contract?

new_issues_prs.title: vulkan: Qwen2.5-14B Q4_K_M bandwidth-efficiency cliff on Lunar Lake iGPU
new_issues_prs.author: NubsCarson
new_issues_prs.significance: Identified critical performance issues on Intel hardware causing models to be 'unusable'.

new_issues_prs.title: feat: add NEAR AI inference provider
new_issues_prs.author: PierreLeGuen
new_issues_prs.significance: Expands the framework's AI provider compatibility into the Web3 space.

new_issues_prs.title: Restore packages/os/linux/variants/milady-tails
new_issues_prs.author: NubsCarson
new_issues_prs.significance: Restores 6,157 files to recover Tails-based security hardening and persistent storage features.

overall_focus.claim: Foundational hardening of the core framework, specifically for headless Linux/Windows servers and ESM-first plugin alignment.
Enhancing release integrity through SLSA build provenance and SBOM security attestations.

discord_updates.summary: Clarification provided regarding token rumors; it was confirmed that no new token has been launched. Continued discussion on open-source project continuity after labs became defunct.
Focus was entirely on hackathon announcements and professional recruitment. Significant self-promotion from full-stack AI developers and recruitment for the Sunflower Polygon project.

user_feedback.feedback_summary: Users reported ongoing bot spam creating fake support ticket rooms in Discord.
Developer reports issues with JavaScript runtime on specific Linux host environments.

strategic_insights.insight: Intel's NPU demonstrates superior power efficiency for Whisper-based ASR but is currently outperformed by iGPUs for autoregressive LLM tasks.
implications_or_questions: Should the project pivot its Intel strategy to use NPUs exclusively for voice processing while maintaining GPU paths for text?

strategic_insights.insight: The community is actively filling the gap left by the defunct 'labs' company, with significant focus on high-standards infrastructure (SOC2, multi-arch targets).
implications_or_questions: How will governance shift as the project matures into a fully community-led initiative?

market_analysis.observation: Mantle Network is incentivizing agentic AI at scale with a $100K prize pool centered on trading and dev-tools.
market_analysis.relevance: Strongly signals market interest in onchain AI agents and RWA (Real World Asset) integrations.
